mandatory_nric: Bring NRIC / Singpass for identity verification
mandatory_meds: Prepare a list of your current medications and supplements
knowledge_new: Read the 'Understanding FH' guide to learn how inherited cholesterol differs from standard cholesterol.
knowledge_little_research: Watch Lisa Ho's pre-test counselling walkthrough video to see what happens during genetic counselling.
knowledge_advanced: Note down any highly specific technical or inheritance questions to discuss with your genetic counsellor.
topic_costs: Verify your CHAS/PG/MG status to confirm your exact genetic testing subsidy rate.
topic_insurance: Review the Life Insurance Association (LIA) Moratorium fact sheet inside HealthHub.
topic_family: Draft a list of close blood relatives (parents, siblings, children) to discuss for cascade screening.
topic_treatment: Write down any questions about the long-term safety, side effects, or cost of lipid-lowering medications.
concern_test: Prepare questions about how DNA sample collection works and the expected timeline for results.
concern_family: List family members who have had early heart attacks or high cholesterol before age 50.
concern_cost: Review the MOH subvention options and MediSave limits for genetic testing fees.
concern_insurance: Locate your current active life and health insurance policy documents for reassurance.
